summary: Tested Failure Mode versioning fix. All 5 features verified working: GET returns correct id/legacy_id/version fields, version history endpoint returns version list, PATCH increments version and creates history entry, Version History dialog displays correctly with change diffs, and Restore/Rollback button works to revert to previous versions.
critical_code_review_comments: The safe_isoformat helper in _serialize() method correctly handles both datetime objects and string values, fixing the isoformat() error
seed_data_creation: None - used existing failure mode legacy_id=53 (Short Circuit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Failure mode versioning is fully working. The fix for isoformat() error in _serialize() method handles both datetime objects and string values. Version history for legacy_id=53 now has 21+ versions from testing.

feature_1_get_failure_mode.description: GET /api/failure-modes/{mode_id} returns correct id, legacy_id, and version fields
feature_1_get_failure_mode.details: Tested with legacy_id=53. Returns MongoDB ObjectId as 'id', legacy_id=53, version=20+, RPN=315 (severity=9). All datetime fields properly serialized as strings.

feature_2_version_history_endpoint.details: Returns versions array with id, version number, snapshot (FMEA data), updated_by, change_reason, and created_at. Total count matches array length.

feature_3_update_increments_version.description: PATCH /api/failure-modes/{mode_id} increments version and creates version history entry
feature_3_update_increments_version.details: Updating severity from 8 to 9 incremented version from v19 to v20, recalculated RPN, and added new entry to version history.

feature_4_version_history_dialog.description: Version History dialog displays correctly in UI with version numbers and change diffs
feature_4_version_history_dialog.details: Dialog shows: Current version badge (v20), 'Live version' indicator, change diffs (Severity: 8→9, RPN: 280→315), historical versions (v19, v18, v17) with Restore buttons, timestamps, and 'Changed by' attribution.

feature_5_rollback_button.description: Restore/Rollback button works to revert to a previous version
feature_5_rollback_button.details: Clicking Restore on v19 successfully rolled back: version incremented to v21, severity restored to 8, RPN restored to 280. Success toast shown: 'Rolled back to version 19'.

playwright_tests.change_diffs_displayed: PASS - Severity and RPN changes shown
playwright_tests.rollback_functionality: PASS - Rolled back to v19, version incremented to v21

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: MongoDB failure_modes collection had documents with date fields stored as strings instead of datetime objects, causing isoformat() errors
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added safe_isoformat helper in _serialize() method that handles both datetime objects and string values
bug_fix_verification.verification: All datetime fields (created_at, updated_at, validated_at) now properly serialize without errors
